sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, message STRING);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, message) VALUES (1, 'Hello🦆'), (2, 'DuckDB is great!');
UPDATE test_table SET message = right(message, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, right(message, 5) AS last_five_chars FROM test_table;
SELECT id, right(message, 2) AS last_two_chars FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
